configurations.name: kaagazai
runtimeArgs: export PATH="$HOME/.local/node/bin:$PATH"; cd "$HOME/Hackathon-KaagazAi" && exec npm run dev -- -p 3001

configurations.name: kaagazai-test
runtimeArgs: export PATH="$HOME/.local/node/bin:$PATH"; cd "$HOME/Hackathon-KaagazAi" && export GEMINI_API_KEY='' GROQ_API_KEY='' NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL='' SUPABASE_URL='' SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY='' NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY='' KAAGAZ_MOCK=1 && exec npm run dev -- -p 3003

configurations.name: justautomatex
runtimeArgs: export PATH="$HOME/.local/node/bin:$PATH"; cd "$HOME/justautomatex" && exec npm run dev -- -p 3002

configurations.name: scheduler
runtimeArgs: export PATH="$HOME/.local/node/bin:$PATH"; cd "$HOME/Scheduler" && exec npm run dev
